source_jobs.title: AI Automation Engineer
source_jobs.description:
YOUR MISSION

As our AI Automation Engineer, you will be the driving force behind scaling efficiency at Cosuno. As the expert for Cosuno’s automation stack, you will partner with teams across the company to identify, design, and implement AI-driven workflows that transform their work. Rather than building or training proprietary models from scratch, you will leverage state-of-the-art existing models and reasoning chains to solve business problems.

As part of the product team, you will collaborate closely with the CEO & CTO to ensure all solutions are technically sound and aligned with our core infrastructure. This is an execution-heavy role where success is measured by the speed and reliability of the modular automation platform you build.




KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Discovery & Prioritization: Partner with Finance, Sales, Ops & Product to identify high-ROI automation opportunities & evaluate them based on business impact versus technical effort.

 - Workflow Engineering: Design, prototype, and deploy end-to-end AI workflows by building our orchestration stack (e.g., n8n, Vector Databases) and connecting various endpoints via APIs to build a universal memory for Cosuno.

 - Scaling & Modularity: Build solutions that are modular and reusable across different departments to avoid "reinventing the wheel" for every new request.

 - Enablement & Governance: Establish AI guardrails, while enabling AI champions in other departments to work with the automations themselves.

 - Monitoring & Optimization: Define and track success metrics (ROI, time saved, reliability) to ensure automations deliver continuous value.




YOUR PROFILE

 - The "Product" Mindset: You treat internal tools like products. You prioritize ruthlessly and focus on business value over "perfect code” or "beautiful UI”.

 - Technical Fluency: You are proficient in Python, n8n, and API architecture. You have hands-on experience with RAG and connecting LLMs to proprietary data sources.

 - Applied AI Focus: You prefer building “Reasoning Chains” and integrating existing tools over training custom models.

 - Systems Thinker: You see the company as a series of interconnected data flows. You naturally see patterns and build modular solutions that scale across teams.

 - Change Agent: You have experience driving organizational change and can explain complex technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders with ease.

 - Pragmatic Innovator: You would rather ship a working automation in two weeks than a perfect one in six months, and you have the commercial sense to block non-feasible requests.




WHY US

 - Applied AI, Not R&D: You won’t spend months training models that never go live. You’ll leverage the modern stack (LLMs, Vector DBs, n8n) to ship high-impact automations that solve real business problems immediately.

 - Uncapped Leverage: Construction is one of the last undigitized global industries. We aren't optimizing ad-clicks; we are building the digital nervous system for the physical world. Your efficiency gains here have a massive multiplier effect.

 - Strategic Ownership: You aren’t hidden in a silo. Collaborating directly with the CEO & CTO, you have the autonomy to identify bottlenecks and build the infrastructure that allows Cosuno to scale.




ABOUT US

Cosuno – Revolutionizing construction through technology.

We are Cosuno – a fast-growing tech startup that is making the construction industry more efficient and transparent with our digital platform for tenders and procurement processes. Our goal: to solve the most complex challenges in the industry with innovation and simplicity.

Why Cosuno?

Artificial intelligence is the key to our solution: it analyzes millions of price data points and helps construction companies create precise and efficient bids. This not only saves our customers time but also helps them avoid unnecessary costs.

But for us, it's not just about technology – it's about the people who drive it. At Cosuno, you will work with creat

source_jobs.title: Senior Full Stack Developer (TypeScript)
source_jobs.description:
YOUR MISSION

As a key member of our Engineering team, you won't just be writing code—you'll be solving complex problems and taking full ownership of features from concept to deployment. You will have a direct impact on a product used by thousands of construction professionals to build the world around us.

In your first few months, you might:

 - Design and build new AI features, such as our recently launched AI agent for editing BoQs or automated AI bidder recommendations

 - Collaborate with product managers and designers to shape the user experience and technical direction of our core product.

 - Architect and implement modular packages and services in our monorepo to improve the structure and maintainability of our codebase




HOW WE BUILD: OUR ENGINEERING CULTURE

We believe in a calm, collaborative, and productive engineering environment. We trust our engineers and give them the autonomy to do their best work. Our approach includes:

 - Agile & Fast-Paced: We practice trunk-based development with daily releases to get value into our users' hands quickly.

 - Quality by Default: We maintain a comprehensive Cypress E2E test suite and enforce strict typing, linting, and formatting rules to keep our codebase clean and maintainable.

 - DevOps Mindset: Our well-oiled CI/CD pipeline deploys to AWS via Kubernetes, with our entire infrastructure managed as code using Terraform.

 - Collaboration & Transparency: We value open discussion, constructive code reviews, and a culture where the best idea wins, regardless of who it comes from.




YOUR PROFILE

We're looking for an experienced engineer who is passionate about building great products. You'll be a great fit if you have:

 - Significant professional experience building, shipping, and maintaining complex web applications using TypeScript.

 - Deep expertise in Node.js for backend development and a strong command of React for the frontend.

 - A pragmatic approach to problem-solving and a high sense of ownership, feeling comfortable driving projects independently.

 - Experience working in collaborative, agile product teams.

 - Excellent communication skills in English.

Bonus Points For (Nice-to-Haves):

 - Experience with our infrastructure stack (AWS, Kubernetes, Terraform).

 - Experience with building and maintaining CI/CD pipelines.

 - An interest in data engineering or machine learning.




WHY US?

 - Competitive Compensation: A competitive salary above the market average.

 - Work-Life Balance: Choose to work 100% remotely or from our modern office in Berlin. We offer flexible working hours to fit your life.

 - Top-Notch Equipment: A new MacBook Pro to ensure you have the best tools for the job.

 - A Great Team: Regular company off-sites and team events that connect us as people, not just colleagues.

 - Job Security: A permanent contract in a stable, well-funded company.




ABOUT US

Cosuno – Revolutionizing construction through technology.

We are Cosuno – a fast-growing tech startup that is making the construction industry more efficient and transparent with our digital platform for tenders and procurement processes. Our goal: to solve the most complex challenges in the industry with innovation and simplicity.

Why Cosuno?

Artificial intelligence is the key to our solution: it analyzes millions of price data points and helps construction companies create precise and efficient bids. This not only saves our customers time but also helps them avoid unnecessary costs.

But for us, it's not just about technology – it's about the people who drive it. At Cosuno, you will work with creative minds who are reshaping the construction industry. We believe in diversity because we know that the best ideas come from different perspectives. An integrative and inclusive work environment is a matter of course for us.

Join us – Build the future of construction.

source_jobs.title: Principal Full Stack Developer (TypeScript)
source_jobs.description:
YOUR MISSION

In this role, you will act as a technical leader, shaping the future of our platform and mentoring the engineers around you. You'll tackle our most ambiguous and challenging technical problems, ensuring our systems are scalable, reliable, and built for the long term.

Your mission might include:

 - Driving the technical vision and architecture for our core product, working closely with our ML team to integrate new AI features.

 - Leading the design and execution of large-scale technical projects, such as evolving our monorepo strategy or migrating a core service to a new architecture.

 - Mentoring other senior engineers, elevating the team's skills through code reviews, architectural guidance, and establishing best practices.

 - Partnering with product and engineering leadership to identify and de-risk technical challenges in the product roadmap for the next 1-2 years.




HOW WE BUILD: OUR ENGINEERING CULTURE

We believe in a calm, collaborative, and productive engineering environment. We trust our engineers and give them the autonomy to do their best work. Our approach includes:

 - Agile & Fast-Paced: We practice trunk-based development with daily releases to get value into our users' hands quickly.

 - Quality by Default: We maintain a comprehensive Cypress E2E test suite and enforce strict typing, linting, and formatting rules to keep our codebase clean and maintainable.

 - DevOps Mindset: Our well-oiled CI/CD pipeline deploys to AWS via Kubernetes, with our entire infrastructure managed as code using Terraform.

 - Collaboration & Transparency: We value open discussion, constructive code reviews, and a culture where the best idea wins, regardless of who it comes from.




YOUR PROFILE

We're looking for a seasoned technical leader who is passionate about building great products and great teams. You'll be a great fit if you have:

 - Extensive experience (typically 10+ years) in software engineering, with a proven track record of architecting and delivering complex, scalable web applications.

 - Deep, system-level expertise in our core technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and the ability to reason about the entire stack, from the database to the browser.

 - A history of leading complex technical projects and making critical architectural decisions.

 - A passion for mentoring and technical leadership. You find joy in helping other engineers grow and in elevating the technical bar for the whole team.

 - Excellent communication skills in English, with the ability to articulate complex technical concepts to both technical and non-technical audiences.




WHY US

 - Competitive Compensation: A competitive salary above the market average.

 - Work-Life Balance: Choose to work 100% remotely or from our modern office in Berlin. We offer flexible working hours to fit your life.

 - Top-Notch Equipment: A new MacBook Pro to ensure you have the best tools for the job.

 - A Great Team: Regular company off-sites and team events that connect us as people, not just colleagues.

 - Job Security: A permanent contract in a stable, well-funded company.




ABOUT US

Cosuno – Revolutionizing construction through technology.

We are Cosuno – a fast-growing tech startup that is making the construction industry more efficient and transparent with our digital platform for tenders and procurement processes. Our goal: to solve the most complex challenges in the industry with innovation and simplicity.

Why Cosuno?

Artificial intelligence is the key to our solution: it analyzes millions of price data points and helps construction companies create precise and efficient bids. This not only saves our customers time but also helps them avoid unnecessary costs.

But for us, it's not just about technology – it's about the people who drive it. At Cosuno, you will work with creative minds who are reshaping the construction industry. We believe in diversity because we know that the best ideas come from different perspectives. A

source_jobs.title: Customer Success Manager
source_jobs.description:
Das Nachunternehmer-Segment von Cosuno befindet sich in einer starken Wachstumsphase. Um dieses Wachstum nachhaltig abzusichern, bauen wir eine neue Customer Success Struktur speziell für dieses Segment auf. Als Customer Success Manager gehörst du zu den ersten Personen, die diesen Bereich formen und langfristig prägen.

Du begleitest unsere Nachunternehmer nach Vertragsabschluss, führst sie durch ein strukturiertes Onboarding, unterstützt und analysierst die Nutzung, erkennst Risiken frühzeitig und entwickelst Accounts aktiv weiter. Du sorgst dafür, dass unsere Kunden das Produkt nicht nur verstehen, sondern konkrete, messbare Ergebnisse erzielen.

Hier packen alle mit an: Du arbeitest nicht nur operativ im Tagesgeschäft, sondern baust Prozesse und Strukturen aktiv mit auf. Du testest neue Ansätze, bewertest deren Erfolg und prägst so das Fundament für nachhaltigen Customer Success im Nachunternehmer-Segment.

 - Du bearbeitest Kundenanfragen per E-Mail, Telefon oder Chat - schnell, empathisch und lösungsorientiert

 - Du erstellst Analysen und Reportings zum Nutzungsverhalten der Kunden, um Risiko oder Upsell Signale zu identifizieren und gezielte Maßnahmen einzuleiten
   
   - Hierzu arbeitest du eng mit dem Sales & Product Team zusammen

 - Du arbeitest eng mit Sales und Product zusammen, um Kundenfeedback weiterzugeben und Verbesserungspotenziale aufzudecken

 - Du erklärst unsere Plattform in einem maßgeschneiderten Onboarding und hilfst bei Fragen zur Nutzung, Einrichtung oder zu Funktionen

 - Kunden durch Schulungen, Webinare und strukturierte Enablement Inhalte weiterentwickeln.
   
   


DEIN PROFIL

 - Mind. 2 Jahre Erfahrung im Customer Success, Account Management oder in einer vergleichbaren Rolle, idealerweise im B2B SaaS und Sales Umfeld.

 - Du hast Freude daran, anderen zu helfen, bist empathisch, dabei aber stets ziel- und lösungsorientiert

 - Du bist strukturiert, zuverlässig und priorisiert eigenständig

 - Du bist ein Kommunikationstalent, sowohl in der direkten Kundeninteraktion als auch in Workshops oder Webinaren.

 - Du bist daten-affin, arbeitest gekonnt mit KPIs und hilfst uns dabei Nutzungsdaten zu interpretieren und Kundenerfolg so messbar zu machen

 - Du testest neue Ansätze, bewertest kritisch, was funktioniert, und baust Prozesse aktiv von Null auf - eigeninitiativ und mit unternehmerischem Mindset.

 - Deutsch auf Muttersprachniveau (C2) ist unerlässlich; weitere Sprachkenntnisse sind von Vorteil.
   
   


WARUM WIR?

 - Du gestaltest eine neue Customer Success Organisation im Nachunternehmer-Segment von Anfang an mit.

 - Du übernimmst direkte Verantwortung für Retention, Wachstum und Kundenerfolg in einem strategisch wichtigen Segment.

 - Du arbeitest eng mit Product, Sales, Support und Management zusammen und siehst den Impact deiner Arbeit unmittelbar.

 - Du profitierst von flexiblen Arbeitsmodellen, moderner Ausstattung und einer offenen, transparenten Kultur.

 - Teilnahme an Firmenevents und regelmäßigen Teamevents (sowohl offline als auch online).

 - Offene Feedback-Kultur mit regelmäßigen 1:1-Meetings und Entwicklungsgesprächen.




ABOUT US

Cosuno – Revolutionizing construction through technology.

We are Cosuno – a fast-growing tech startup that is making the construction industry more efficient and transparent with our digital platform for tenders and procurement processes. Our goal: to solve the most complex challenges in the industry with innovation and simplicity.

Why Cosuno?

Artificial intelligence is the key to our solution: it analyzes millions of price data points and helps construction companies create precise and efficient bids. This not only saves our customers time but also helps them avoid unnecessary costs.

But for us, it's not just about technology – it's about the people who drive it. At Cosuno, you will work with creative minds who are reshaping the construction industry. We believe in diversity because we know that the best ideas come from different persp

source_jobs.title: Sales Manager
source_jobs.description:
Du hast Biss, Hunger auf Erfolg und willst Deals closen, statt nur über Leads zu reden? Dann ist das hier dein Spielfeld.

Als Sales Manager übernimmst du bei uns den kompletten Sales Cycle – vom ersten Call über Demos bis hin zum Closing. Du bist nicht nur ein Teil unseres Teams, du bist ein Treiber für das Wachstum im jungen Nachunternehmer-Bereich von Cosuno. Hier zählen Motivation, Ehrgeiz und echtes Closing-Mindset – wir suchen keine Verwalter, sondern Macher.

Die Prozesse und Tools entwickeln sich ständig weiter – und genau deshalb brauchen wir Leute wie dich: flexibel, innovativ, mit dem Drive, Dinge voranzubringen. Deine Ideen und dein Input sind nicht nur willkommen, sie sind entscheidend für die Performance des gesamten Teams.

 - Own the full cycle: Vom ersten Touchpoint bis zum unterschriebenen Vertrag.

 - Cold & warm outreach: Du identifizierst und kontaktierst die richtigen Leads und qualifizierst sie als echte Sales Opportunities.

 - Beziehungen aufbauen: Du gewinnst das Vertrauen potenzieller Kunden – und wandelst es in Abschlüsse um.

 - Demos & Closing: Du führst Produktvorstellungen durch und bringst die Deals über die Ziellinie.

 - Pipeline Management: Du hältst deine Opportunities in Salesforce sauber, strukturiert und immer auf Closing-Kurs.




DEIN PROFIL

 - Du hast bereits Erfahrung in Akquise und Sales – idealerweise im B2B-Umfeld.

 - Du bist hungrig nach Erfolg: Ziele motivieren dich, Ehrgeiz treibt dich an.

 - Du hast ein echtes Closing-Mindset: Für dich zählt der Abschluss, nicht nur der Prozess.

 - Du bist kommunikativ stark und überzeugst am Telefon, per Mail und in Demos.

 - Du bringst Ideen mit, denkst unternehmerisch und willst dich selbst und das Team nach vorne pushen.

 - Du bist flexibel und bewegst dich sicher in einem Umfeld, in dem Prozesse und Tools sich schnell entwickeln.

 - Du willst nicht nur einen Job, sondern eine echte Karriere im Vertrieb.

 - Du sprichst verhandlungssicheres Deutsch (C2 oder vergleichbar). Weitere Sprachen, vor allem Englisch, sind ein Plus.




WARUM WIR?

 - Gestalte ein Produkt mit echtem Impact: Wir lösen reale Probleme in einer der größten Industrien Europas – der Bauwirtschaft.

 - Performance-Kultur: Ungedeckelte Provision, transparente Regeln und 100 % Eigenverantwortung für deinen Erfolg.

 - Flexibilität: Arbeite remote oder in unserem modernen Office in Berlin-Friedrichshain.

 - Team-Spirit: Internationales, dynamisches Team mit flachen Hierarchien und echtem Zusammenhalt.

 - Wachstum: Regelmäßiges Feedback, 1:1s und Entwicklungsgespräche – wir wollen, dass du dich weiterentwickelst.

 - Erfolge feiern: Ob Firmenevents oder Teamevents – wir gewinnen und feiern gemeinsam.




ABOUT US

Cosuno – Revolutionizing construction through technology.

We are Cosuno – a fast-growing tech startup that is making the construction industry more efficient and transparent with our digital platform for tenders and procurement processes. Our goal: to solve the most complex challenges in the industry with innovation and simplicity.

Why Cosuno?

Artificial intelligence is the key to our solution: it analyzes millions of price data points and helps construction companies create precise and efficient bids. This not only saves our customers time but also helps them avoid unnecessary costs.

But for us, it's not just about technology – it's about the people who drive it. At Cosuno, you will work with creative minds who are reshaping the construction industry. We believe in diversity because we know that the best ideas come from different perspectives. An integrative and inclusive work environment is a matter of course for us.

Join us – Build the future of construction.

source_jobs.title: Senior Product Designer (m/f/d)
source_jobs.description:
YOUR MISSION

 - Take full ownership of the end-to-end product design process, working on clearly defined problems in close collaboration with the Product Team — from ideation and prototype testing to ready-to-ship visual designs.

 - Collaborate with our existing Product Designer to evolve our design language and ensure a cohesive experience across both sides of the platform.

 - Work hand-in-hand with our product and engineering teams, identifying high-impact UX opportunities and delivering solutions that are technically feasible and ship fast.

 - Translate concepts into high-fidelity designs, adhering to and maintaining our scalable design system in Figma.

 - Craft clear, engaging UI copy to guide users through the product.




YOUR PROFILE

Must-have:

 - 3–5 years of experience as a Product Designer in a well-known B2B SaaS company or high-growth SaaS startup.

 - Proven ability to design complex, desktop-first B2B web applications end-to-end — from problem framing to interaction design and handoff, ideally demonstrated in your portfolio.

 - Strong product thinking: Ability to find pragmatic “80/20” solutions that balance user value, technical constraints, and business goals.

 - Expert-level Figma skills and experience collaborating with other designers in shared workspaces, including component libraries and design systems.

 - Self-driven, outcome-oriented, able to work independently while communicating trade-offs and constraints clearly.

 - Native German speaker with fluent English.

Nice-to-have:

 - Experience using AI-assisted coding tools (like Claude code, cursor etc) to build realistic, functional prototypes.

 - Foundational understanding of HTML/CSS to ship smaller improvements to the product or website yourself.

 - UX copywriting experience.




WHY US

 - You'll shape a product that solves real-life problems in the construction industry and see the results of your work in the hands of real users.

 - You’ll work in an open-minded, collaborative, and international team where your ideas are valued.

 - Choose to work fully remote (within Germany) or from our modern office in Berlin Friedrichshain.

 - Regular company and team events (offline and online).

 - Competitive compensation, a permanent contract, and modern work equipment.

 - An open feedback culture with regular 1-on-1s to support your professional development.




ABOUT US

Cosuno – Revolutionizing construction through technology.

We are Cosuno – a fast-growing tech startup that is making the construction industry more efficient and transparent with our digital platform for tenders and procurement processes. Our goal: to solve the most complex challenges in the industry with innovation and simplicity.

Why Cosuno?

Artificial intelligence is the key to our solution: it analyzes millions of price data points and helps construction companies create precise and efficient bids. This not only saves our customers time but also helps them avoid unnecessary costs.

But for us, it's not just about technology – it's about the people who drive it. At Cosuno, you will work with creative minds who are reshaping the construction industry. We believe in diversity because we know that the best ideas come from different perspectives. An integrative and inclusive work environment is a matter of course for us.

Join us – Build the future of construction.

source_jobs.title: Platform & Security Engineer
source_jobs.description:
YOUR MISSION

You'll take over full ownership of infrastructure, security, compliance, and internal IT — domains currently handled directly by our CTO. You'll have complete autonomy and the trust to run these areas as you see fit.

This is a hands-on individual contributor role. There is no team to manage — you'll be the person doing the work, not delegating it. We're looking for someone who is sharp, self-directed, and comfortable owning broad responsibility across multiple domains.

In your first few months, you might:

 - Lead our ISO 27001 certification and establish the processes to maintain it going forward

 - Take ownership of our Terraform configurations across AWS and GCP, improving structure and reliability

 - Respond to security questionnaires from enterprise customers, helping us close deals faster

 - Streamline employee IT onboarding and access management across our SaaS tooling stack

 - Set up and manage MDM, tooling, and IT support for the team




HOW WE WORK

At Cosuno, we believe in giving people real ownership and trusting them to do their best work. For this role, that means:

 - High autonomy, high impact: You'll own your domains end to end. You'll be writing Terraform, responding to audits, configuring tooling, and solving problems yourself — with the full support of the CTO and Engineering team when you need it.

 - DevOps mindset: Our infrastructure is managed as code with Terraform, deployed to AWS and GCP via Kubernetes, with self-hosted CI/CD runners. You'll be working with a modern, well-structured stack.

 - Compliance as a product: We treat security and compliance seriously — not as a checkbox, but as a genuine part of how we build trust with enterprise customers.

 - Collaborative by default: You'll work closely with our Full Stack Engineering team, who can support on infrastructure when capacity allows.




YOUR PROFILE

You'll be a great fit if you have:

 - Full professional fluency in German and English — a significant part of our compliance and customer-facing security work is conducted in German, and this is a firm requirement

 - Solid experience with cloud infrastructure (AWS and/or GCP) and infrastructure-as-code (Terraform)

 - Comfort operating Kubernetes in a production environment

 - The ability to pick up new domains quickly — whether that's navigating an ISO 27001 audit or setting up an MDM solution, you figure things out by thinking clearly, not by having done it ten times before

 - A pragmatic, ownership-driven mindset: you're equally comfortable debugging a Kubernetes issue and writing a security policy

 - The organisational maturity to manage multiple open threads — an audit, an RFI, an infra task — without things slipping

Bonus points for:

 - Experience with ISO 27001 or other security certifications

 - Experience with compliance automation tooling (Vanta, Drata, Kertos, or similar)

 - Familiarity with GDPR operational requirements (DPAs, DSARs, vendor reviews)

 - CI/CD experience, including self-hosted runners

 - Prior experience at a B2B SaaS startup




WHY US?

 - Competitive Compensation: A competitive salary above the market average.

 - Work-Life Balance: Choose to work 100% remotely or from our modern office in Berlin. We offer flexible working hours to fit your life.

 - Top-Notch Equipment: A new MacBook Pro to ensure you have the best tools for the job.

 - A Great Team: Regular company off-sites and team events that connect us as people, not just colleagues.

 - Job Security: A permanent contract in a stable, well-funded company.




ABOUT US

Cosuno – Revolutionizing construction through technology.

We are Cosuno – a fast-growing tech startup that is making the construction industry more efficient and transparent with our digital platform for tenders and procurement processes. Our goal: to solve the most complex challenges in the industry with innovation and simplicity.

Artificial intelligence is the key to our solution: it analyzes millions of pric

source_jobs.title: Senior AI Engineer
source_jobs.description:
YOUR MISSION

Join our AI team and build the intelligent systems at the core of Cosuno's platform.

 - AI for Construction: Take new models and AI capabilities from idea to production — design, train, evaluate, deploy, iterate — and own them end to end.

 - Price Prediction: Improve the models that help users evaluate bids and make better procurement decisions, trained on millions of price data points.

 - Ranking, Search & Retrieval: Iterate on the systems that match the right subcontractors to the right tenders.

 - Experimentation & Evaluation: Design offline evals, run online A/B tests, and drive metrics-led iteration.

 - AI Agent Development: Build and improve our agentic system that orchestrates multi-step reasoning to navigate the complex, often messy tendering workflow.

 - Ship into the product: Take your work all the way to real users — model, backend service, API, and the integration into our TypeScript web app.

 - Collaborate across teams: Work with Product, Engineering, and Data to translate business problems into shipped ML/AI features.

 - Maintain production ML & AI: Monitoring, alerting, and continuous improvement of everything we deploy.


YOUR PROFILE

 - Strong ML & deep learning background: You have 5+ years building, training, and shipping machine learning models — classical ML and deep learning — in production. You're fluent in a modern deep learning framework, ideally PyTorch.

 - Strong Python: You have 5+ years writing production-grade Python. You write clean, well-structured code.

 - LLM application depth: You have deep hands-on experience building and deploying LLM/agent systems — RAG, tool use, multi-step reasoning, evals.

 - Experimentation rigor: You know how to evaluate models properly — offline metrics, online A/B tests — and let the data decide.

 - TypeScript, React, Node: You're comfortable shipping your work into our web app — backend service, API, and front-end integration.

 - End-to-end product delivery: You've shipped features (not just models) into a production system and owned the path from research code to real users.

 - Product mindset: You're comfortable with ambiguity and can judge when something is good enough to ship.

 - Sharp problem solver: You look at a complex system, quickly identify what matters, and decide what to do next.

 - Bias for action: When you're unsure something will work, your instinct is to find out with data rather than keep wondering.


BONUS

 - Experience building search/ranking/recommendation systems or pricing models

 - Experience with embedding models, fine-tuning, or model training at scale

 - Domain exposure to construction, procurement, or marketplaces


WHY US

 - Shape a product that solves real-life problems in the construction industry

 - Work in an open-minded, collaborative, dynamic, and international team

 - Fully remote team and work culture

 - Freedom in your working hours. It's the results that count.

 - Company off-sites and regular team events (offline and online)

 - Flexible working conditions with the possibility to do workations

 - Competitive compensation, a permanent contract, and modern work equipment

 - Open feedback culture with regular 1-on-1s


ABOUT US

Cosuno – Revolutionizing construction through technology.

We are Cosuno – a fast-growing tech startup that is making the construction industry more efficient and transparent with our digital platform for tenders and procurement processes. Our goal: to solve the most complex challenges in the industry with innovation and simplicity.

source_jobs.title: Senior Customer Success Manager
source_jobs.description:
Als Senior Customer Success Manager bei Cosuno agierst du als strategischer Architekt für die digitale Transformation unserer Kunden aus der Baubranche. In dieser Rolle begleitest du deine Kunden weit über die reine Plattformnutzung hinaus und fungierst als vertrauenswürdiger Berater auf C-Level-Ebene. Dein Fokus liegt dabei auf der proaktiven Prozessberatung, bei der du komplexe, oft traditionell geprägte Arbeitsabläufe analysierst und in effiziente, digitale Workflows überführst.
Die besondere Herausforderung dieser Position liegt im anspruchsvollen Multi-Stakeholder-Management innerhalb von Organisationen. Du navigierst sicher durch unterschiedliche Interessengruppen – vom Einkauf über die Projektleitung bis hin zur Geschäftsführung – und moderierst diesen Wandel mit ausgeprägtem Fingerspitzengefühl. Als Experte für Change Management antizipierst du strukturelle Widerstände und stellst durch gezielte Strategien sicher, dass die digitale Neuausrichtung nachhaltig in der Unternehmenskultur verankert wird. So sicherst du nicht nur den langfristigen Business Value für deine Kunden, sondern treibst die strategische Weiterentwicklung der gesamten Branche maßgeblich voran.

Deine Aufgaben

 - Du steuerst ein Portfolio strategischer Key Accounts und agierst als zentraler Partner auf Management-Ebene, um die digitale Transformation ihrer Einkaufsprozesse maßgeblich zu prägen.

 - Du entwickelst maßgeschneiderte Success-Pläne, die über die reine Tool-Nutzung hinausgehen und tief in die strategische Organisationsentwicklung deiner Kunden eingreifen.

 - Du verantwortest das komplexe Multi-Stakeholder-Management und moderierst souverän zwischen unterschiedlichen Interessengruppen – vom operativen Einkauf bis zur Geschäftsführung.

 - Du agierst als strategischer Prozessberater, analysierst bestehende Strukturen und überführst diese in effiziente, digitale Workflows.

 - Du leitest ganzheitliche Change-Management-Prozesse, antizipierst strukturelle Widerstände und etablierst eine nachhaltige digitale Kultur bei unseren Kunden.

 - Du sicherst den langfristigen Business Value durch fundierte Reviews, identifizierst proaktiv Churn-Risiken sowie Upselling-Potenziale und treibst die Expansion deiner Accounts voran.

 - Du fungierst als Mentor für das Team und teilst deine Expertise in der Beratung komplexer Organisationen, um unsere Customer-Success-Standards stetig weiterzuentwickeln.



Dein Profil

 - Mehrjährige Erfahrung in der strategischen Betreuung von Großkunden (SaaS) oder in einer Managementberatung mit Fokus auf Transformation und Prozessoptimierung.

 - Fundierte Expertise in Change-Management-Methodiken und die Fähigkeit, komplexe organisatorische Veränderungen sicher zu moderieren.

 - Herausragendes Stakeholder-Management und absolute Verhandlungssicherheit auf C-Level-Ebene.

 - Starke analytische Fähigkeiten, um komplexe Prozesslandschaften der Bauwirtschaft zu durchdringen und in datengetriebene Strategien zu übersetzen.

 - Hohes Maß an Empathie und Überzeugungskraft, um Kunden für neue, digitale Wege zu begeistern.

 - Deutsch und Englisch auf Muttersprachniveau (C2) für eine rechtssichere und souveräne Kommunikation in einem professionellen Umfeld.

 - Ausgeprägte Eigeninitiative sowie die Ambition, als Senior-Profil die strategische Ausrichtung des Customer Success aktiv mitzugestalten.


Why us?

 - Gestalte ein Produkt, das reale Probleme in der Baubranche löst.

 - Arbeite in einem offenen, kooperativen, dynamischen und internationalen Team.

 - Du hast die Flexibilität, in unserem modernen Büro in Berlin-Friedrichshain oder hybrid zu arbeiten.

 - Teilnahme an Firmenevents und regelmäßigen Teamevents (sowohl offline als auch online).

 - Attraktive Vergütung mit einem ungedeckelten Bonus, unbefristetem Vertrag und modernem Equipment.

 - Offene Feedback-Kultur mit regelmäßigen 1:1-Meetings und Entwicklungsgesprächen.

 - Transparente Provisionsregelung mit 100% eigenem Einfluss auf deinen Erfolg.

source_jobs.title: Founders Associate – AI & Commercial Operations (m/w/d)
source_jobs.description:
Als Founders Associate arbeitest du direkt an der Schnittstelle zwischen unserem Gründerteam und dem Management-Team und bekommst einen einzigartigen Einblick in den Aufbau und die Skalierung eines schnell wachsenden Tech-Startups. Du arbeitest an priorisierten Themen, die für unser Wachstum am meisten Hebel haben.



WAS WIR SUCHEN

Wir suchen eine echte Hybrid-Rolle: jemanden, der kommerzielles Verständnis und Tech-/AI-Kompetenz vereint. Du denkst strategisch und priorisierst scharf, bist aber gleichzeitig extrem hands-on und setzt technische Projekte eigenständig um – ohne dabei von anderen Teams abhängig zu sein. Du bist genauso zu Hause in einer Wachstumsdiskussion mit den Gründern wie beim Bauen eines Automatisierungs-Workflows.

Entscheidend: Du bringst nachweislich praktische Erfahrung mit AI- und Automatisierungsprojekten mit. Das ist kein „nice to have“ – es ist der Kern dieser Position. Wir erwarten, dass du konkret zeigen kannst, woran du bereits gearbeitet hast.



DEINE AUFGABEN

 - AI- & Automatisierungsprojekte: Du baust und betreibst eigenständig Lösungen mit Tools wie Claude, Gemini, n8n, make.com http://make.com und vergleichbaren Prozessautomatisierungs-Tools. Ein solides Verständnis von Agentic AI ist dabei essenziell.

 - Prozess- & Funnel-Optimierung: Du identifizierst Engpässe in unseren kommerziellen Prozessen und Funnels und löst sie mit konkreten technischen Lösungen.

 - Sales AI Enablement: Du entwickelst AI-gestützte Tools und Workflows, die unser Sales- und Expansion-Team messbar schneller und besser machen.

 - Strategische Zusammenarbeit: Enge Unterstützung von Gründern und Leadership bei kommerziellen Wachstumsinitiativen – von der Idee bis zur Umsetzung.

 - Cross-funktionale Koordination: Du wirkst als Schnittstelle zwischen Sales, Product und Customer Success und sorgst für zielgerichtete Abstimmung.

 - Markt- & Wettbewerbsanalyse: Du lieferst die Analysen und Entscheidungsvorlagen, die datenbasierte Entscheidungen möglich machen.
   


DEIN PROFIL

 - Kommerzielles Fundament: Erfahrung in einer ähnlichen Funktion, idealerweise in einem schnell wachsenden SaaS-Unternehmen oder in der Managementberatung – ein klarer Pluspunkt, wenn dein Fokus dort im kommerziellen Bereich lag.

 - Nachgewiesene AI-/Tech-Praxis: Du hast nachweislich an AI- und Automatisierungsprojekten gearbeitet (Claude, Gemini, n8n, make.com http://make.com o. Ä.) und verstehst Agentic AI nicht nur theoretisch, sondern hast es umgesetzt.

 - Eigenständige Umsetzungskraft: Du führst technische Projekte selbstständig von der Konzeption bis zum Go-Live durch.

 - Strategisches Denken & Priorisierung: Du behältst bei vielen parallelen Themen den Überblick und setzt die richtigen Prioritäten.

 - Kommunikationsstärke: Du motivierst und koordinierst funktionsübergreifende Teams.

 - Ambition: Du willst in einer dynamischen Organisation wachsen und langfristig Verantwortung übernehmen.

 - Sprachen: Verhandlungssicheres Englisch und Deutsch auf muttersprachlichem Niveau.
   


WHY US

 - Direkte Zusammenarbeit mit erfahrenen Gründern

 - Tiefer Einblick in den Aufbau und die Skalierung eines SaaS-Start-ups

 - Viel Verantwortung ab Tag 1

 - Flexible Arbeitszeiten & hybride Arbeitsweise

 - Offene, ehrliche und motivierte Teamkultur mit kurzen Entscheidungswegen

source_jobs.title: Founders Associate - Internship
source_jobs.description:
Als Founder’s Associate Praktikant:in unterstützt du unser Gründerteam in allen Bereichen – von Strategie bis operatives Tagesgeschäft. Dabei kannst du deine eigenen Ideen einbringen, Verantwortung übernehmen und viel lernen.

 - Direkte Zusammenarbeit mit den Gründern bei strategischen Initiativen und operativen Aufgaben

 - Unterstützung bei der Vorbereitung von Pitches, Reports, Präsentationen und Analysen

 - Durchführung von Markt- und Wettbewerbsanalysen

 - Mitarbeit bei Projekten in den Bereichen Business Development, Sales, Fundraising oder Operations - je nach aktuellem Fokus

 - Übernahme eigener kleiner Projekte von A bis Z

 - Organisation und Begleitung von internen Prozessen und Meetings
   

Your profile

 - Du studierst aktuell (Bachelor oder Master) in einem wirtschaftsnahen Studiengang oder stehst kurz vor dem Abschluss

 - Du hast erste praktische Erfahrungen im Start-up-Umfeld, in der Beratung, im VC oder in einem SaaS-Unternehmen gesammelt (kein Muss, aber ein Plus)

 - Du arbeitest eigenverantwortlich, strukturiert und lösungsorientiert

 - Du bist neugierig, analytisch stark und hast keine Scheu, mit anzupacken

 - Du sprichst fließend Deutsch und Englisch
   
   

Why us

 - Direkte Zusammenarbeit mit erfahrenen Gründern

 - Tiefer Einblick in den Aufbau und die Skalierung eines SaaS-Start-ups

 - Viel Verantwortung ab Tag 1

 - Flexible Arbeitszeiten & hybride Arbeitsweise

 - Offene, ehrliche und motivierte Teamkultur mit kurzen Entscheidungswegen

 - Aussicht auf Übernahme als Werkstudent:in oder in Festanstellung



Über uns

Cosuno – Wir revolutionieren die Baubranche durch Technologie.

Wir sind Cosuno – ein schnell wachsendes Tech-Startup, das die Baubranche mit unserer digitalen Plattform für Ausschreibungen und Beschaffungsprozesse effizienter und transparenter macht. Unser Ziel: die komplexesten Herausforderungen der Branche mit Innovation und Einfachheit zu lösen.


WARUM COSUNO?

Künstliche Intelligenz ist der Schlüssel zu unserer Lösung: Sie analysiert Millionen von Preisdatenpunkten und hilft Bauunternehmen dabei, präzise und effiziente Angebote zu erstellen. Das spart unseren Kunden nicht nur Zeit, sondern hilft ihnen auch, unnötige Kosten zu vermeiden.

Aber für uns geht es nicht nur um Technologie – es geht um die Menschen, die sie vorantreiben. Bei Cosuno arbeitest du mit kreativen Köpfen zusammen, die die Baubranche neu gestalten. Wir glauben an Diversität, denn wir wissen, dass die besten Ideen aus unterschiedlichen Perspektiven entstehen. Ein integratives und exklusives Arbeitsumfeld ist für uns eine Selbstverständlichkeit.

Werde Teil unseres Teams – Gestalte die Zukunft der Baubranche.

source_jobs.title: Technical Product Manager
source_jobs.description:
YOUR MISSION

The future of construction software isn't a single closed platform — it's a connected ecosystem. As our Technical Product Manager for Integrations, you'll own how Cosuno connects to the third-party systems our customers already rely on, from estimating and ERP tools like RIB iTWO to the open REST API that lets others build on top of us. You'll be the bridge between our customers, our engineers, and our platform — turning real-world integration needs into a roadmap that makes Cosuno the infrastructure the construction industry plugs into.

This is a hands-on, customer-facing role in our Product team. Both our REST API and our connectors are still early, so you won't just maintain an integration surface — you'll shape it. You'll spend real time on-site with customers, understand how their systems actually work, and translate that into a product that lets them connect to Cosuno as seamlessly as possible.



IN YOUR FIRST FEW MONTHS, YOU MIGHT:

 - Take ownership of our integrations product area — the REST API and our existing connectors to third-party systems such as RIB iTWO — and define where they go next.

 - Travel to customers across Germany to support them hands-on with implementing and setting up connectors, and to understand their systems, data flows, and constraints in the real world.

 - Sit down with customers to elicit integration requirements, then prioritize them against impact, effort, and our platform strategy.

 - Translate those requirements into clear, well-scoped tickets that our engineers can pick up and build — with the technical context they need to move fast.

 - Work through our API documentation and test endpoints yourself to validate what's possible, spot gaps, and represent the developer experience from the outside in.

 - Partner with Engineering, Customer Success, and Sales to make sure customers can connect their systems to Cosuno with as little friction as possible.




HOW WE WORK

At Cosuno, we give people real ownership and trust them to do their best work. For this role, that means:

 - High autonomy, high impact: You'll own the integrations area end to end. No one will look over your shoulder, but you'll always have the support of the Product and Engineering teams when you need it.

 - Close to the customer: This is not a desk-only PM role. A meaningful part of your time is spent with customers on-site.

 - Technical by nature: You'll work directly with APIs, documentation, and connector behavior. You don't have to ship production code, but you do need to be comfortable in technical territory.

 - Platform thinking: We're building the infrastructure other construction tools and AI agents connect into. Every integration decision feeds that bigger picture.

 - AI-first: We use AI deeply in both our product and our daily work, and we want people who do the same.
   
   


YOUR PROFILE

You'll be a great fit if you have:

 - 3–5 years of experience in product management, ideally in B2B SaaS, platform, or developer-facing products.

 - Hands-on experience with APIs and integrations — you understand how REST APIs work, can read and reason about API documentation, and are comfortable validating endpoints (e.g. with tools like Postman) yourself.

 - A talent for working directly with customers: eliciting requirements, asking the right questions, and earning trust in technical conversations.

 - The ability to translate messy, real-world integration needs into prioritized, well-scoped tickets that engineers can act on.

 - Strong analytical thinking and a pragmatic instinct for turning complex problems into workable solutions.

 - Native-level German (this is a firm requirement — all of our customers are German construction companies and you'll work with them directly and on-site) and fluent English.

 - Willingness to travel regularly to customers within Germany.

 - You use AI tools — LLM-based assistants, MCPs, no-code prototyping — routinely in your day-to-day work.



Bonus points fo

source_jobs.title: Senior Analytics Engineer
source_jobs.description:
YOUR MISSION

As a member of our Data team, you'll take full ownership of the systems that turn raw data into decisions—for our product, our internal teams, our customers, and our investors. You won't just maintain dashboards; you'll own the pipeline end to end, from ingestion to the numbers people actually act on.

In your first few months, you might:

 - Take ownership of our dbt pipeline, improving our data models so they're reliable, well-tested, and easy to build on.

 - Maintain and extend our Looker setup, and ship new dashboards and reports that customers and other stakeholders depend on.

 - Strengthen our data pipeline from Postgres to BigQuery, and build custom Python scripts to automate the flows that keep our warehouse fresh.

 - Integrate our data warehouse with external tools like Salesforce or ActiveCampaign, so the right data reaches the teams that need it.




HOW WE BUILD: OUR ENGINEERING CULTURE

We believe in a calm, collaborative, and productive engineering environment. We trust our people and give them the autonomy to do their best work. Our approach includes:

 - Ownership Over Handoffs: On a small data team, you own your work from ingestion to dashboard. We trust you to make decisions and run with them.

 - Quality by Default: We treat our data models like production code—tested, version-controlled, and documented—so the numbers we serve are ones we can stand behind.

 - DevOps Mindset: We automate the boring parts. Pipelines, syncs, and checks are powered by third-party tools or GitHub Actions so the team can focus on the work that needs a human.

 - Collaboration & Transparency: We value open discussion, constructive reviews, and a culture where the best idea wins, regardless of who it comes from.

 - AI-Native by Default: We work heavily with Claude Code and other AI tools, and they're a core part of how we build—from writing models and scripts to debugging pipelines and exploring data. We expect everyone on the team to use them fluently and keep getting better at it.




YOUR PROFILE

We're looking for an experienced data practitioner who likes owning the full stack of an analytics platform. You'll be a great fit if you have:

 - Significant professional experience building and maintaining data models with dbt and writing advanced SQL.

 - Solid Python skills for data syncing, automation, and general scripting.

 - Hands-on experience with a cloud data warehouse such as BigQuery, and comfort working with source databases like Postgres.

 - Experience building dashboards and serving data to non-technical stakeholders (a strong command of Looker is a big plus).

 - Strong, hands-on familiarity with AI coding tools—especially Claude Code—and a habit of using them as part of your daily workflow.

 - A pragmatic approach to problem-solving and a high sense of ownership, feeling comfortable driving projects independently.

 - Excellent communication skills in English.


BONUS POINTS FOR (NICE-TO-HAVES):

 - Experience with reverse ETL or integrating a data warehouse with tools like ActiveCampaign or Salesforce.

 - Experience building and maintaining CI/CD or automation pipelines (e.g. GitHub Actions).

 - Experience preparing data and reporting for external audiences such as customers or investors.

 - An interest in data engineering best practices, pipeline reliability, and infrastructure-as-code.




WHY US?

 - Competitive Compensation: A competitive salary above the market average.

 - Work-Life Balance: Choose to work 100% remotely or from our modern office in Berlin. We offer flexible working hours to fit your life.

 - Top-Notch Equipment: A new MacBook Pro to ensure you have the best tools for the job.

 - A Great Team: Regular company off-sites and team events that connect us as people, not just colleagues.

 - Job Security: A permanent contract in a stable, well-funded company.




ABOUT US

Cosuno – Revolutionizing construction through technology.

We are Cosuno – a fast-growing tech startup

source_jobs.title: Senior Product Manager - General Contractors
source_jobs.description:
YOUR MISSION

With the power of AI, we're set to revolutionize the way general contractors create, manage, and award bid packages. As our Senior Product Manager General Contractors, you'll actively shape this product vision — in a small team with big leverage and direct impact on a product used by thousands.




YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES

 - You independently own product responsibility for central areas of the general contractor product.

 - You identify new opportunities in the GC workflow: new user groups within the GC organization that we don't yet serve, or new steps in the tendering process that we can cover with our product.

 - You build complex B2B SaaS functionality end-to-end — from strategy and discovery to requirements definition and go-live — together with design and engineering.

 - You analyze user behavior, market trends, and product metrics to identify growth opportunities and translate them into strategic initiatives.

 - You develop hypotheses, validate them with prototypes and experiments, and scale successful approaches together with design and engineering.

 - Together with marketing and customer success, you ensure a successful go-to-market for new features.




WHAT YOU BRING

 - 3–5 years of product management experience in a B2B SaaS environment, ideally with complex, multi-step workflows for business or enterprise customers.

 - Demonstrated experience discovering new opportunities: identifying new user groups or covering new process steps in an existing product.

 - Strong analytical skills and a talent for translating complex problems into pragmatic solutions.

 - You use AI tools such as LLM-based assistants, MCPs, and no-code prototyping routinely in your day-to-day work.

 - Experience with product roadmaps, user stories, and the full product lifecycle.

 - Fluent in written and spoken German and English.



YOUR BENEFITS

 - Help shape a product that solves real-world problems in the construction industry through AI and is revolutionizing the market.

 - Work in an open-minded, dynamic, and international team.

 - Remote or from our modern office in Berlin Friedrichshain.

 - Regular company and team events (offline and online).

 - Permanent contract and modern equipment.

 - Open feedback culture with regular 1:1s and development conversations.



ABOUT US

Cosuno – Revolutionizing construction through technology.

We are Cosuno – a fast-growing tech startup that is making the construction industry more efficient and transparent with our digital platform for tenders and procurement processes. Our goal: to solve the most complex challenges in the industry with innovation and simplicity.




WHY COSUNO?

Artificial intelligence is the key to our solution: it analyzes millions of price data points and helps construction companies create precise and efficient bids. This not only saves our customers time but also helps them avoid unnecessary costs.

But for us, it's not just about technology – it's about the people who drive it. At Cosuno, you will work with creative minds who are reshaping the construction industry. We believe in diversity because we know that the best ideas come from different perspectives. An integrative and inclusive work environment is a matter of course for us.

Join us – Build the future of construction.

source_jobs.title: Senior Product Manager - Marketplace
source_jobs.description:
YOUR MISSION

With the power of AI, we're set to revolutionize the way general contractors and subcontractors find and match with each other on our marketplace. As our Senior Product Manager Marketplace, you'll actively shape this product vision — in a small team with big leverage and direct impact on a product used by thousands.




YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES

 - You own the marketplace dynamics between General contractors and Subcontractors on our platform.

 - You ensure a healthy balance between supply and demand, and build mechanisms that keep liquidity strong on both sides.

 - You own search, matching and recommendation mechanisms that bring Subcontractors and projects together in a way that increases relevance and bid rate.

 - You analyze marketplace metrics and translate them into hypotheses and priorities.

 - You identify AI use cases for matching and recommendations and implement them together with our designers and engineers.




WHAT YOU BRING

 - 3–5 years of product management experience with two- or multi-sided marketplaces.

 - Demonstrated experience thinking through supply-demand dynamics: how to create enough supply, enough demand, and how to balance the sometimes conflicting interests of both sides.

 - Experience with search or matching algorithms, or working closely with data and engineering teams on ranking or recommendation logic.

 - Strong analytical skills and a solid understanding of marketplace metrics such as liquidity, conversion, and network effects.

 - You use AI tools such as LLM-based assistants, MCPs, and no-code prototyping routinely in your day-to-day work.

 - Fluent in written and spoken German and English.



YOUR BENEFITS

 - Help shape a product that solves real-world problems in the construction industry through AI and is revolutionizing the market.

 - Work in an open-minded, dynamic, and international team.

 - Remote or from our modern office in Berlin Friedrichshain.

 - Regular company and team events (offline and online).

 - Permanent contract and modern equipment.

 - Open feedback culture with regular 1:1s and development conversations.



ABOUT US

Cosuno – Revolutionizing construction through technology.

We are Cosuno – a fast-growing tech startup that is making the construction industry more efficient and transparent with our digital platform for tenders and procurement processes. Our goal: to solve the most complex challenges in the industry with innovation and simplicity.




WHY COSUNO?

Artificial intelligence is the key to our solution: it analyzes millions of price data points and helps construction companies create precise and efficient bids. This not only saves our customers time but also helps them avoid unnecessary costs.

But for us, it's not just about technology – it's about the people who drive it. At Cosuno, you will work with creative minds who are reshaping the construction industry. We believe in diversity because we know that the best ideas come from different perspectives. An integrative and inclusive work environment is a matter of course for us.

Join us – Build the future of construction.

notes: Highly technical roles, AI focus, and rapid hiring pace suggest a scaling startup with strong engineering needs.
